page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.48xlarge is a general-purpose, network and EBS-optimized instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 virtual CPUs mapped to 96 physical Intel cores with a dedicated allocation and a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio.

This instance includes 11,400 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, providing high-capacity, low-latency local storage directly attached to the host. Networking capabilities are highly provisioned, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps, which supports high-throughput data transfers and optimized Amazon Elastic Block Store performance.

Given its massive resource density, including high vCPU count, substantial memory, and extensive local NVMe storage, the m8idn.48xlarge represents a high-tier investment optimized for demanding enterprise workloads. It is designed for large-scale databases, high-throughput data processing, memory-intensive general-purpose applications, and network-heavy workloads that require high-speed local scratch space.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.48xlarge is a high-capacity, general-purpose instance built on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 vCPUs across 96 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 768.0 GB of RAM. This instance is equipped with 11,400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-speed, low-latency local data access. With a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps, it is highly optimized for network and EBS performance. The balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio of 4.0 GB per core, combined with massive local storage and high-speed networking, makes this instance highly efficient for resource-intensive enterprise applications. It is particularly suited for large-scale database deployments, high-throughput data processing pipelines, and network-heavy workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 192 Intel vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, 11,400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 300 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.48xlarge features 192 Intel vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, 11.4 TB NVMe SSD storage, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring massive local NVMe storage, high-speed networking, and dedicated Intel processing power.
